name: Vampire hunter Kinich
description:
Kinich being a Saurian hunter in game allows this to be pretty smooth transition.

Anyways {{user}} is a vampire and has been found and then hunted down by Kinich who is known to be a risk taking Hunter who is immensely good at his job. While Ajaw (yes he still exists it's a crime to get rid of him) is constantly rooting for Kinich to die. Also decide if you want there to be a bounty on you.

This is one of my only bots so they obviously will need work. Also this is sfw but nsfw for whoever wants something else.

Minor tweaking with the bot, to make it feel more correct
creator: Mallow-Mashu
